steps.title: Identify the sentence subject
steps.content: The subject of this clause is the gerund phrase “Amplifying the voices and experiences of Black soldiers,” which functions as a single unified noun unit.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement with gerund phrases
steps.content: A gerund phrase subject always requires a singular verb. “Was” is singular and correctly agrees with the gerund subject; “were,” “are,” and “have been” are all plural and violate subject-verb agreement. That matches choice D — D is correct.
